definition: Failed breakout / liquidity sweep where price breaks a significant level then immediately reverses back into the range. Named after the 'Turtle Traders' whose breakout entries become the liquidity that smart money sweeps. Turtle soup is the ICT version of a stop hunt — it IS the manipulation phase of PO3.
depends_on: liquidity (the level that gets swept — BSL above highs or SSL below lows)
market_structure (the swing high/low that defines the level)
sessions_and_kill_zones (turtle soup is most reliable during kill zones)
feeds_into: entry_models (turtle soup IS the Layer 3 trigger event for trade entry)
displacement (displacement candle after turtle soup confirms the reversal)
breaker_blocks (the OB that was protecting the level becomes a breaker after the soup)
related_to: liquidity_sweep (turtle soup IS a specific type of sweep)
judas_swing (Judas swing can manifest AS a turtle soup pattern)
stop_raid_displacement_retracement (turtle soup is step 1 of the SRDR sequence)

buy_setup.name: Turtle Soup Long (SSL sweep)
buy_setup.step_1: Identify significant swing low with SSL below it (equal lows = even better)
buy_setup.step_2: Price breaks below the low — retail shorts trigger, buy-stops hit
buy_setup.step_3: Within 1-3 candles, price CLOSES back above the swept level
buy_setup.step_4: This close-back IS the turtle soup confirmation
buy_setup.step_5: Wait for displacement + FVG in bullish direction
buy_setup.entry: Buy on FVG fill or OB retest after the reversal. SL below the sweep extreme.
buy_setup.tp: Next BSL level above (draw on liquidity)

sell_setup.name: Turtle Soup Short (BSL sweep)
sell_setup.step_1: Identify significant swing high with BSL above it (equal highs = even better)
sell_setup.step_2: Price breaks above the high — retail longs trigger, sell-stops hit
sell_setup.step_3: Within 1-3 candles, price CLOSES back below the swept level
sell_setup.step_4: This close-back IS the turtle soup confirmation
sell_setup.step_5: Wait for displacement + FVG in bearish direction
sell_setup.entry: Sell on FVG fill or OB retest after the reversal. SL above the sweep extreme.
sell_setup.tp: Next SSL level below (draw on liquidity)

high_quality: Swept level is a major reference (PDH/PDL, PWH/PWL, equal highs/lows)
Occurs during a kill zone (London open, NY open)
CHoCH or BOS confirms the reversal on LTF
Volume spike on the sweep candle (if visible)
low_quality: Swept level is a minor intraday swing (not significant)
Occurs during lunch hour or low-liquidity periods
No displacement after the sweep — just a slow grind back
Sweep was too deep (5%+ beyond level — may be a real breakout)

turtle_soup_vs_real_breakout.turtle_soup: Wick beyond level + close back inside. Quick reversal (1-3 candles). Volume spike then drop.
turtle_soup_vs_real_breakout.real_breakout: Body close beyond level. Sustained move with follow-through. Volume increases on continuation.
turtle_soup_vs_real_breakout.decision_rule: If candle CLOSES beyond the level AND the next candle continues — it's NOT turtle soup. Exit immediately.

depth_of_sweep.shallow_sweep: 1-5 pips/points beyond the level — standard turtle soup
depth_of_sweep.deep_sweep: 10-30 pips/points beyond — still valid if closes back within 1-3 candles
depth_of_sweep.too_deep: >50 pips or >0.5% of price beyond — likely real breakout, not manipulation
depth_of_sweep.rule: The deeper the sweep that still reverses, the STRONGER the signal (more stops were collected)

bridge_integration.detection: Scan for price that breaks swing high/low then closes back within 1-3 bars
bridge_integration.auto_flag: Mark as turtle_soup_confirmed when close-back is detected
bridge_integration.score_impact: Turtle soup replaces liquidity_sweep score when confirmed (higher quality signal)
bridge_integration.connection_to_pipeline: Turtle soup IS the Layer 3 event — it satisfies the 'sweep confirmed' requirement
